message:
fix(extras): mermaid class syntax, resize coalescer evidence tests, snapshot cleanup

mermaid.rs: Fix resolve_styles_multiple_class_merge test to use
space-separated class targets ("class A a b") matching the updated
parse_class_line comma-splitting behavior from the prior commit.

resize_coalescer.rs (bd-plwf): Add comprehensive JSONL evidence field
validation tests — verify all required schema fields (schema_version,
run_id, event_idx, screen_mode, cols, rows) and event-specific fields
(elapsed_ms, dt_ms, event_rate, regime, action, pending/applied
dimensions, time_since_render_ms, coalesce_ms, forced) are present and
correctly typed in decision log output.

screen_snapshots.rs: Remove obsolete set_detected_profile_override call
from app_all_screens_80x24 test — capability injection now goes through
the new set_detected_capabilities_override API.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
